title: Add real-time WebSocket support to a Next.js app
summary: Set up Socket.io (or native ws) with a custom Next.js server for bi-directional real-time communication, including client hooks and typed events.
declaration: I will add real-time WebSocket support to your Next.js app using Socket.io with a custom server. This requires a custom Node.js server (not the default Next.js dev server), so Vercel Edge Functions won't work — you'll need a long-running host like Railway, Fly.io, Render, or a VPS. If you prefer server-sent events (SSE) for one-way streaming instead, say so before I begin.
